raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX I rented a car from XXXX. When I looked at my Amex bill, there was an additional charge of {$15.00} from PREMIUM CAR RENTAL INSUR, NY. When I called and ask what that was, they said it was primum car insurance from American Express. I said I never asked for it and I want the money refunded and the service discontinued. They said they can not refund it because I signed up on it via a another card I had several years ago. I said I never signed up for it with THIS particular card and there is no mention on it ANYWHERE on the website or a section to discontinue it. They said they would discontinue the service and refund me the {$15.00}. Both never happened. I tried to dispute it again, and I got the same results. I dont want this service, I can not find where to discontinue it and I want a refund for my {$15.00} because I never requested it.
